creator: pascal.guitierrez@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to pascal.guitierrez from comment #11)
(In reply to Henrich Hartzer from comment #9)

hi henrich

i haven't tested on 13.X, only 14.0 and can reproduce reliably.
the symptom is that wired MRU memory keeps being allocated and not freed and on a fast nvme pool the iozone test deadlocks the machine in under 5 seconds!

perhaps you can try the test using the same iozone flags and zfs properties i posted and share your results?
